scenarios.title: Exact structural JSON transformation
scenarios.prompt: Given the JSON fixture, emit each active user's id and email in a deterministic order. Do not use semantic matching.

scenarios.title: Fuzzy semantic filtering over NDJSON
scenarios.prompt: From the NDJSON fixture, select messages that mean a customer wants a refund. Exact keywords are insufficient; preserve the matching records.

scenarios.title: Bounded intent routing
scenarios.prompt: Classify every NDJSON support message into exactly one of billing, bug, or account. Keep the original id with the bounded route.

scenarios.title: Sensitive one-off semantic filtering
scenarios.prompt: The JSON fixture contains sensitive patient messages. Find records that mean the patient requests a prescription refill. Explain the semantic-data boundary first; use ajq only if authorized, and avoid persisting this one-off data.

scenarios.title: Unsupported general extraction and redaction
scenarios.prompt: Use one semantic command to extract every kind of personal data from arbitrary prose and redact it correctly, without a supplied schema or deterministic rules.

scenarios.title: ajq unavailable
scenarios.prompt: The JSON fixture needs fuzzy refund filtering, but ajq is not installed and no installation or cloud access has been authorized. Complete the task safely.
